page: Alibaba Cloud ecs.r7a.32xlarge is an x86_64 architecture server instance powered by AMD EPYC 7T83 processors running at a base clock speed of 2.55 GHz. The instance features 128 dedicated physical cores with a single thread per core, providing 128 vCPUs. It is equipped with 1024.0 GB of RAM, establishing an 8.0 GB memory-to-core ratio.

This instance does not include local NVMe storage, requiring external block storage volumes for persistent data. It features a baseline network bandwidth of 32 Gbps. There are no integrated GPUs, and complimentary public IPv4 addresses are not included. The KVM hypervisor manages virtualization for this dedicated CPU allocation.

Given the high memory density of 1024.0 GB RAM alongside 128 dedicated physical cores, the instance offers a resource-dense profile for memory-bound workloads. This configuration is designed for large-scale in-memory databases, enterprise resource planning systems, heavy data caching layers, and memory-intensive analytics workloads that do not require local storage or GPU acceleration.
description: Alibaba Cloud ecs.r7a.32xlarge is a memory-optimized instance featuring 128 dedicated physical cores powered by AMD EPYC 7T83 processors running at 2.55 GHz. Built on the x86_64 architecture under a KVM hypervisor, it provides 1024.0 GB of RAM, yielding an 8.0 GB memory-per-core ratio. The instance operates with a single thread per core and dedicated CPU allocation, ensuring consistent compute performance. Network connectivity is supported by a 32 Gbps baseline bandwidth. Tradeoffs include the absence of local storage and GPU hardware, meaning all storage must be attached externally. This server is configured for memory-intensive applications, such as large-scale in-memory databases, data caching layers, and enterprise workloads requiring significant RAM capacity without the need for local disk IOPS or graphics acceleration.

tagline: A high-density, memory-optimized instance featuring dedicated AMD EPYC processors and a one-to-eight core-to-RAM ratio for memory-intensive enterprise workloads.
bullet_points: 128 dedicated physical AMD EPYC 7T83 cores running at 2.55 GHz
1024.0 GB of RAM providing an 8.0 GB memory-to-core ratio
32 Gbps baseline network bandwidth for external data transfer
No local storage or GPU accelerators included in the hardware profile
Designed for in-memory databases, enterprise applications, and caching layers
